ac_verdict.AC-1: PASS - callProvider 真实施; @anthropic-ai/sdk + openai 均已 import; MODEL_BY_TIER reasoning={primary:'claude-sonnet-4-6', fallback:'gpt-4o'}, lightweight={primary:'claude-haiku-4-5', fallback:'gpt-4o-mini'}; _callAnthropic 调 client.messages.create(), _callOpenAI 调 client.chat.completions.create()
ac_verdict.AC-2: PASS - @upstash/ratelimit Ratelimit.tokenBucket(limit, '1d', limit); PLAN_LIMITS={free:50,pro:500,enterprise:5000}; env 缺失时 warn+skip(local dev); 生产路径单次 Upstash 查询 <5ms by design
ac_verdict.AC-3: PASS - _callWithRetry(primary, req, 1) = 1 retry; 两次 primary 失败后 _callWithRetry(fallbackModel, req, 0); response.fallback={from,to,reason} 已设; 测试 AC-3 用例确认 Anthropic 被调 2 次, OpenAI 1 次
ac_verdict.AC-4: PASS - 两 provider 均失败 → 返 fallback 模板字符串; logger.error('llm.both_failed') 已触发; writeCostLog({success:false, errorCode:'BOTH_FAILED'}) 调用确认
ac_verdict.AC-5: PASS - getAnthropicClient(): if(!key) throw new Error(`ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing for ${tier} tier`); 测试 AC-5 用例 rejects.toThrow(/ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing for reasoning tier/) 通过
ac_verdict.AC-6: PASS - writeCostLog 写: userId/accountId/agentId/modelUsed/promptTokens/completionTokens/totalTokens/costUsd/durationMs/success/isFallback/fallbackFrom/fallbackTo/traceId 全部覆盖; Decimal 精度 6 位
ac_verdict.AC-7: PASS - grep "from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'" apps/ 仅命中 apps/api/src/workers/llm-gateway/index.ts 1 文件; anthropic-provider.ts 不 import SDK (只用 RawAnthropicResponse 类型)
ac_verdict.AC-8: PASS - grep "from 'openai'" apps/ 仅命中 apps/api/src/workers/llm-gateway/index.ts 1 文件; openai-provider.ts 不 import SDK
ac_verdict.AC-9: PASS - grep ANTHROPIC_API_KEY|OPENAI_API_KEY + log|console|logger: 0 命中; key 仅在 getAnthropicClient/getOpenAIClient 内以变量传递, 从不记录
ac_verdict.AC-10: NOTE - P50/P99/cost 是生产 SLA, 不可 unit test; 实现使用 reasoning timeout=60_000ms, lightweight=30_000ms, 成本估算 claude-sonnet-4-6 $3/M+$15/M output → 典型请求远 <$0.30; 架构符合
ac_verdict.AC-11: PASS - checkRateLimit(userId) 是 complete() 第一步; 抛 RateLimitError 后直接 throw 不触发 _callProvider; 测试: callProviderSpy not.toHaveBeenCalled() 通过
ac_verdict.AC-12: PASS - pnpm typecheck exit 0; 6 packages (api/web/admin/schemas/ui/clients) 全通过
ac_verdict.AC-13: PASS - 单元 15 个(fallback×9, rate×6, vi.mock 不真调 SDK) + 集成 1(nock 拦截 Anthropic HTTP) = 16/16 通过; ≥6 单元要求满足
